title: Pierre Nozière
summaries: "Pierre Nozière" by Anatole France is a collection of autobiographical memories published in 1899. Through his alter ego Pierre Nozière, France recalls scenes from childhood and first romantic conquests. The work contains three parts: childhood memories, philosophical notes on Plutarch, and travels through French towns and countryside. This book continues the memoir series France began with "Le Livre de mon ami" in 1885, exploring formative experiences that shaped the writer's early years.
